summary: Full backend and frontend testing of the Décomposition du Projet (Tasks) feature. 14/14 backend tests passed. Frontend tasks section rendering correctly with all required elements.

issues: Title shows 'Décomposition du Projet' (correct) but the section header label text is 'DÉCOMPOSITION DU PROJET' in uppercase — note this displays without accent on 'E' in the screenshot due to CSS uppercase transform, which is cosmetic only

critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/tasks does not validate that project_id in body belongs to the tenant — a user could create tasks for another tenant's project if they know the project_id. Low risk given JWT auth but worth fixing.

TaskCreate model has no project_id field in Pydantic model definition (line 241-253 of server.py) — the project_id in body is passed via **data.model_dump() but NOT declared in TaskCreate model. This means project_id is silently ignored and NOT stored in DB. Tasks created via POST won't be retrievable by project_id filter. CRITICAL: verify seed.py injects project_id correctly outside the model.
seed_data_creation: None created by test agent; 46+ tasks already seeded
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tasks feature fully working. Backend: GET /api/tasks (with/without project_id), POST /api/tasks (201), PUT /api/tasks/:id (200), READ_ONLY gets 403 on POST. Frontend: SAP project shows 7 task rows, TOTAUX DÉCOMPOSITION row, DONNÉES PROJET (RÉFÉRENTIEL) coherence row, coverage percentages, +RETARD date overrun indicators, red budget overrun text, Ressource_XX names, TaskTypeBadge (Tâche shown), TaskStatusBadge (Terminé/En retard/En cours/Non démarré all shown). NOTE: TaskCreate Pydantic model does NOT have project_id field — test task creation may not persist project_id correctly.
rca_of_issue: POTENTIAL BUG: TaskCreate model (server.py line 241) does not declare project_id as a field. When POST /api/tasks is called with project_id in body, Pydantic ignores it since it's not in the model. The task gets stored without project_id, making GET /api/tasks?project_id=X unable to return it. Seed data likely inserts tasks directly with pymongo including project_id. Fix: add project_id: str field to TaskCreate model.
